description: Los Zetas were a Mexican drug cartel founded in 1997 by Osiel Cárdenas Guillén, originally as an armed wing of the Gulf Cartel. They engaged in drug trafficking, murder, money laundering, and cybercrime, operating primarily in Tamaulipas and expanding across Mexico and internationally. The cartel was known for its extreme violence and military-style tactics. By 2018, the organization was dismantled, with factions such as the Cartel del Noreste continuing operations.

country_links.evidence_quote: Tenían operaciones extranjeras en países como ... Costa Rica ...
country_links.context: Los Zetas had foreign operations in Costa Rica.

country_links.evidence_quote: El 17 de mayo de 2011 asesinaron y decapitaron a 27 guatemaltecos en una finca en el departamento de Petén , Guatemala .
country_links.context: Los Zetas carried out a massacre in Guatemala, killing and decapitating 27 people.

country_links.evidence_quote: Tenían operaciones extranjeras en países como ... Honduras ...
country_links.context: Los Zetas had foreign operations in Honduras.

country_links.evidence_quote: El 15 de febrero de 2011 asesinaron al agente estadounidense Jaime Zapata, quien estaba en el Servicio de Inmigración y Control de Aduanas de Estados Unidos.
country_links.context: Los Zetas killed a U.S. immigration and customs enforcement agent in Mexico.
